info.name: mapyourmeds_ips — datasync API
info.description:
Every datasync endpoint built so far in the IPS / SuiteRx Express port.

TOP-LEVEL FOLDERS:
  • Status — health/connectivity checks.
  • ⭐ PRIORITY — Consumer (Phase 2) — the 29 endpoints the live consumer (mym/config/ips.class.js) calls. Verified 29/29 -> 2xx on server. TEST THESE FIRST. Sub-grouped by controller.
  • Parity (Phase 3) — additional MetizDatasyncAPI endpoints built ahead (SPs known); NOT called by the current consumer.

All API endpoints are POST. Inputs are mostly query params; two calls (PrescriptionData, GetDataByID) branch on body/query. Set the `baseUrl` + sample-id collection variables, then send.

NOTE: datasync endpoints have NO auth (matching legacy). The core host (Login/Patient/Prescription/Drug, JWT) is Phase 4 and not in this collection yet.

request.description: Live DB connectivity dashboard (pool -> SELECT 1 -> dba.facility_fill_type).
Same checks as JSON; HTTP 503 when degraded.

item.name: ⭐ PRIORITY — Consumer (Phase 2)
